dfp_current.pdf.what: Bourbon County Schools District Facility Plan, KBE approval date August 2021 (current posted plan; next DFP due June 2025)

dfp_2021_excerpt.png.what: Wayback Machine capture of the same August 2021 plan, page 1 (school centers, enrollment/capacity, 2022-24 priorities)
dfp_2021_excerpt.png.source: web.archive.org capture of the education.ky.gov URL above (24 captures, Sep 2015 to Sep 2025)

dfp_2013_excerpt.png.what: Wayback Machine capture of the prior District Facilities Plan, KBE approval date June 2013 (school centers and post-2012-14 major renovation priorities)
dfp_2013_excerpt.png.source: web.archive.org capture of the education.ky.gov URL above

reading_note: Figures under 'Student Enrollment Capacity' read enrollment/capacity; confirmed by the 2021 preschool line 272/200 with the plan's own note that current enrollment is 80 full-day plus 192 half-day students (= 272).
